title: Name/secure License+privacy reviewer + Domain reviewer; open beneficiary outreach
context: Pilot and catalog review require a named License+privacy reviewer and a named Domain (Ewing/sarcoma biology) reviewer before any model is signed off, and the project needs at least one beneficiary-outreach thread opened to ground real need. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Secure and record the named License+privacy and Domain reviewers and open at least one beneficiary-outreach thread.
acceptanceCriteria: A License+privacy reviewer and a Domain reviewer are named (role + how they are qualified) and recorded before the pilot review proceeds.
Reviewer responsibilities and sign-off gates are documented (which deliverables each must approve).
At least one beneficiary/partner-outreach thread is opened and recorded (channel + date + ask), without overstating need.
requestor/verifiedNeed remain TO BE SECURED/false until a named research consumer confirms use.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: REVIEWERS.md recording named reviewers, their sign-off gates, and the opened beneficiary-outreach thread(s).
